---
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="landing-shell">
  <section class="hero">
    <div class="hero__header">
      <h1 class="hero__title">Open Science in the Swedish Context</h1>
      <img class="hero__logo" src="img/SciLifeLab_Logotype_NEG.png" alt="SciLifeLab logo" />
    </div>
    <p class="hero__subtitle">Implement Open Science practices into every step of your research project.</p>
    <div class="hero__actions">
      <a class="hero-cta hero-cta--secondary" href="./0000/">View current instance</a>
      <a class="hero-cta hero-cta--primary" href="https://example.org/registration">Registration open!</a>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="cards-grid cards-grid--top">
    <article class="info-card">
      <div class="card-headline">
        <i class="bi bi-journal-text"></i>
        <h3>Course content</h3>
      </div>
      <div class="card-content">
        <p>Open Science in the Swedish context is designed to teach DDLS research school scientists how to apply Swedish Open Science standards in their daily research.</p>
        <p>The course covers key stages of the research lifecycle, from planning and publication to sharing results, to license communication and responsible archiving.</p>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="info-card">
      <div class="card-headline">
        <i class="bi bi-bullseye"></i>
        <h3>Learning outcomes</h3>
      </div>
      <div class="card-content">
        <ol>
          <li>Get acquainted with Open Science principles and how they are implemented in the Swedish context.</li>
          <li>Develop a foundational understanding of how to apply Open Science principles across key stages of a research project.</li>
          <li>Identify practical next steps to improve openness in your own work.</li>
        </ol>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="info-card">
      <div class="card-headline">
        <i class="bi bi-grid-1x2"></i>
        <h3>Topics covered</h3>
      </div>
      <div class="card-content">
        <ul>
          <li>Learning principles and why they apply to training and teaching.</li>
          <li>Designing and planning sessions, course materials, and feedback loops.</li>
          <li>Teaching techniques to enhance learner engagement and participation.</li>
          <li>Assessment, maintenance, and continuous improvement.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="info-card">
      <div class="card-headline">
        <i class="bi bi-tag"></i>
        <h3>Keywords</h3>
      </div>
      <div class="card-content">
        <ul>
          <li>Open Science</li>
          <li>FAIR</li>
          <li>Reproducibility</li>
          <li>Data stewardship</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </article>
  </section>

  <section class="instances-band">
    <aside class="current-instance-card">
      <p class="instance-label">Current course instance</p>
      <h2 class="instance-title">Current instance</h2>
      <a class="instance-link" href="./0000/">Open</a>
      <a class="instance-register" href="https://example.org/registration">Registration</a>
    </aside>

    <div class="previous-instances">
      <h2 class="section-title">Previous course instances</h2>
      <div class="instance-grid">
        <p class="empty-note">No previous instances published yet.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="cards-grid cards-grid--bottom">
    <article class="info-card">
      <div class="card-headline">
        <i class="bi bi-people"></i>
        <h3>Course founders</h3>
      </div>
      <ul class="people-list">
        <li><strong>SciLifeLab Training Hub</strong><span>Programme owner</span></li>
      </ul>
    </article>

    <article class="info-card">
      <div class="card-headline">
        <i class="bi bi-person-workspace"></i>
        <h3>Contributors</h3>
      </div>
      <ul class="people-list">
        <li><strong>Open Science Team</strong><span>Content and facilitation</span></li>
        <li><strong>DDLS training collaborators</strong><span>Domain experts</span></li>
      </ul>
    </article>
  </section>

  <footer class="landing-footer">
    <p>By SciLifeLab Training Hub. Licensed under CC BY 4.0.</p>
    <p>Built with Quarto and hosted on GitHub Pages.</p>
    <a href="https://github.com/SciLifeLab-Training/scilifelab-training-template-staging" aria-label="GitHub repository">
      <i class="bi bi-github"></i>
    </a>
  </footer>
</div>
```
